text_original:
1 How well do the black robes befit you!
When worn out, we will make others for you.
We will go to your court,
And when we return [from it], we will send you a feast!

2 How good on you are the black robes!
When worn out, we will make others for you.
text_normalized:

We will go to your court,
And when we return [from it], we will send you a feast!

2 How good on you are the black robes!
When worn out, we will make others for you.
